subject: [PATCH v2 23/28] nfsd: allow encoding a filehandle into fattr4 without a svc_fh

2026-04-16.patch_summary: This patch allows the encoding of a filehandle into fattr4 without requiring a svc_fh. It achieves this by adding a new 'fhandle' field to struct nfsd4_fattr_args and copying the filehandle into it from the svc_fh when available. This is necessary for CB_NOTIFY callbacks where the svc_fh is not available.
